title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
changelog: OBS Remote Control page: direct WebSocket (ws:// and wss://) connection to OBS with stream/record toggle, scene switcher, and live performance stats; security fix strips RTMP stream key from unauthenticated status endpoint.
